author: y4rr
content:
Result: 3 silent-fallback findings closed.

Files changed:
- ferrotorch-jit/src/interpreter.rs: split walk into interpret_collect_values + extract_outputs helpers; added pub fn interpret_multi_with_captures.
- ferrotorch-jit/src/module.rs: AotCompiledModule::forward_with_ctx now uses interpret_multi_with_captures; added pub fn saved_tensors() accessor. Removed the 'For now, save the inputs themselves' lie.
- ferrotorch-jit/src/graph_break.rs: GraphSegment::Eager closure no longer captures and replays trace-time output_tensor; returns Err(JitError::UnsupportedOp) naming the op.
- ferrotorch-jit/src/codegen.rs: new pub enum InductorCompileStatus; new pub fn InductorBackend::compile_with_status; Codegen::compile no longer silently delegates to InterpreterBackend (returns Err pointing to compile_with_status).
- ferrotorch-jit/src/lib.rs: re-exported InductorCompileStatus and interpret_multi_with_captures.

Verification:
- cargo test -p ferrotorch-jit --lib: 316 passed; 0 failed.
- cargo test -p ferrotorch-jit (all targets): 316 + 14 + 62 + 32 + 32 + 89 + 3 = 548 passed, 0 failed.
- cargo clippy -p ferrotorch-jit --all-targets -- -D warnings: clean.
- cargo build --workspace: clean (no downstream crate breakage).

Zero blanket #[allow], zero follow-up issues, zero remaining silent fallbacks.
